title: PhysWorldLM Output Standard
description: PW-WSF-1300: Universal output specification for every artifact generated by PhysWorldLM — simulation states, rendered media, sensor data, AI decisions, analytics, datasets, logs, reports, and exports. This schema is the canonical export contract for the entire PhysWorldLM ecosystem.

FileReference.description: Reference to an external file artifact.

path.description: Relative or absolute file path, or cloud URI.

EntityReference.description: Lightweight reference to a world entity.

AssetReference.description: Reference to a registered simulation asset.

Statistics.description: Descriptive statistics for a numeric series.

Confidence.description: Confidence assessment for an output or decision.

Compression.description: Compression descriptor for an output artifact.

BoundingBox2D.description: 2D axis-aligned bounding box in pixel space.

BoundingBox3D.description: 3D axis-aligned bounding box in simulation space.

Identity.description: Unique identity of this output artifact.

creator.description: Agent, pipeline, or system that created this output.

simulation_id.description: ID of the parent simulation run.

persistent_id.description: DOI or persistent identifier for archival.

Classification.description: Semantic classification of the output artifact.

encoding.description: Character or binary encoding (e.g. utf-8, binary).

Generation.description: Provenance and generation context for this output.

pipeline_stage.description: Which pipeline stage produced this output.

SimulationSummary.description: High-level summary of the simulation run.

WorldState.description: Snapshot of the world at a given simulation time.

EntityState.description: Full state export of a single entity at a point in time.

AIResults.description: AI agent reasoning and decision outputs.

Annotation.description: Ground truth annotation attached to a sensor frame.

EventOutputs.description: All events recorded during the simulation.

TimelineOutputs.description: Timeline, keyframes, replay, and checkpoint data.

OrganizationOutputs.description: Organizational unit status at end of simulation.

ElectronicWarfareOutputs.description: Electronic warfare event log and assessment.

ImageOutput.description: A single rendered or sensor image output.

VideoOutput.description: A rendered or recorded video output.

usd_stage_path.description: Default prim path for USD outputs.

TelemetryOutputs.description: Vehicle, sensor, and system telemetry streams.

Analytics.description: Quantitative analytics and KPIs for the simulation run.

sim_speed_ratio.description: Ratio of simulated time to real time.

SecurityDescriptor.description: Security, encryption, and access control metadata.

CompatibilityMap.description: Export compatibility flags for downstream systems.

AIMetadata.description: AI-facing metadata for search, retrieval, and knowledge graph integration.

embedding_refs.description: Vector embedding identifiers for semantic search.

Extensions.description: Flexible extension namespace for future output types and plugins. Keys MUST be namespaced (e.g. 'myorg.mymodule.v1').

examples.$comment: Example 5: Sensor dataset export (ML training data)

ai_metadata.natural_language_summary: Synthetic LiDAR point cloud dataset with 50,000 samples and full 3D bounding box annotations across four object classes, generated by PhysWorldLM for autonomous vehicle perception training.
